turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là một số tin tức mới nhất ngày 1/6/2026:

1. **[Tin re-balances but investors are still betting on scarcity](https://www.mining.com/web/column-tin-re-balances-but-investors-are-still-betting-on-scarcity/)** - Mining.com
   - Giá thiếc đang giao dịch gần mức cao nhất mọi thời đại, với sự tăng trưởng 36% từ đầu năm. Sản xuất thiếc toàn cầu dự kiến sẽ tăng trưởng 8.7% trong năm nay.

2. **[Sơn Tùng M-TP And Tyga Celebrate Vietnamese Heritage With ‘Come My Way’](https://ca.news.yahoo.com/n-t-ng-m-tp-075022394.html)** - Yahoo News Canada
   - Sơn Tùng M-TP hợp tác với nghệ sĩ Tyga trong bài hát mới "Come My Way", kỷ niệm di sản văn hóa Việt Nam.

3. **[US PMI Shows Manufacturing Growth for the Fifth Consecutive Month in May](https://www.scdigest.com/ontarget/26-06-02.php?cid=23122)** - Supply Chain Digest
   - Chỉ số PMI của Mỹ cho thấy sự tăng trưởng trong ngành sản xuất trong tháng Năm.

4. **[June 1: Anti-weaponization fund, NC police officer assault charge](https://www.nbcnews.com/nightly-news-netcast/video/nbc-nightly-news-full-episode-june-1-264319045609)** - NBC News
   - Tin tức về quỹ chống vũ khí hóa và cáo buộc một sĩ quan cảnh sát ở Bắc Carolina.

5. **[Lead-Free Perovskites Push Solar Cells Toward Safer High-Efficiency Designs](https://www.azom.com/news.aspx?newsID=65493)** - AZoM
   - Nghiên cứu về việc thay thế chì bằng các vật liệu an toàn hơn trong thiết kế pin mặt trời.

Nếu bạn cần thêm thông tin hoặc có câu hỏi khác, hãy cho mình biết nhé!

items.title: Column: Tin re-balances but investors are still betting on scarcity - Mining.com
items.summary: Silver Futures $ 75.495 / ozt  7.47%. Micro Gold Futures $ 4713.1 / ozt  3.80%. Micro Silver Futures $ 75.48 / ozt  7.54%. Gold Futures $ 4713.3 / ozt  3.84%. LME three-month tin is trading at $55,225 per metric ton, close to the all-time high of $59,040 reached during the frenzied cross-metals rally in January. The London tin price is up by 36% since the start of the year. The next best performer is aluminum, which has risen by 23% and is experiencing an unprecedented supply shock after the loss of Gulf production due to the Iran war. Tin supply has no direct exposure to the war in the Gulf, unlike aluminum, nickel and copper. Global mine production is on course to grow by a healthy 8.7% this year, according to the International Tin Association (ITA). Production at the Bisie mine in the Democratic Republic of Congo is stable after last year’s brief closure due to encroaching M23 insurgents.

items.title: Sơn Tùng M-TP And Tyga Celebrate Vietnamese Heritage With ‘Come My Way’ - Yahoo News Canada
items.summary: # Sơn Tùng M-TP And Tyga Celebrate Vietnamese Heritage With ‘Come My Way’. Vietnamese superstar, Sơn Tùng M-TP, is crossing over with Western artists, teaming up with American rap artist Tyga on their new single, “Come My Way,” released this past weekend on all streaming platforms. The collaboration feels like a perfect fit, as it bridges Sơn Tùng M-TP’s global expansion and American hip-hop, especially with Tyga’s mixed Vietnamese heritage, giving the song a deeper connection to the music and culture. “Working with Sơn Tùng M-TP on this record felt natural because it gave me a chance to reconnect with a side of my heritage that’s always been part of me,” says Tyga. “Growing up half-Vietnamese, I’ve always had pride in that identity, and being able to celebrate it through music on a global record like this just felt right. Sơn Tùng M-TP is standing on a bronze Chim Lạc, an ancient bird of Vietnam, as it floats through the streets of Downtown Los Angeles.

Trump speaks to NBC News amid Iran talks and administration's apparent abandonment of $1.8 billion fund; Fired police officer charged after video appears to show him repeatedly punching woman; Race against time to find and rescue two men in Laos Cave; and more on tonight's broadcast.June 2, 2026. ## Best of NBC News. ## Top Story. ## Kornacki breaks down numbers on NBA Finals for Spurs and Knicks. ## Taylor Swift announces new original song for 'Toy Story 5'. ## Bad Bunny may meet Pope Leo as they both visit Madrid. ## Sonic booms heard around the U.S. ## How Israeli attacks in Lebanon impact U.S. talks with Iran.

items.title: Lead-Free Perovskites Push Solar Cells Toward Safer High-Efficiency Designs - AZoM
items.summary: **By replacing toxic lead with safer alternatives such as tin, bismuth, antimony, and double perovskites, researchers are charting a path toward next-generation solar cells that could combine high performance with improved environmental safety.**. Image 4: Figure oulined the schematic representation of lead-free perovskite structure (A site represents monovalent cation, X represents a halide anion with bi/trivalent cation from each type of perovskite family) and the year-wise progression of the most efficient PSCs from each lead-free perovskite family from 2016 to 2025. _Figure oulined the schematic representation of lead-free perovskite structure (A site represents monovalent cation, X represents a halide anion with bi/trivalent cation from each type of perovskite family) and the year-wise progression of the most efficient PSCs from each lead-free perovskite family from 2016 to 2025._. The review highlighted key design approaches that have helped raise tin-based lead-free device power conversion efficiencies from below 1% to 17.13%, thereby providing a research roadmap for developing more scalable, high-performance, and environmentally sustainable solar technologies.
